Javascript.HintText: Enter the instalment amount (leave blank if not applicable)

Context.isEnabled: var payDate = Services.getValue(PaymentDate.dataBinding); return('Y' != Services.getValue(JudgmentForthwith.dataBinding) && ( null == payDate || "" == payDate ));
var val = Services.getValue(SinglePaymentAmnt.dataBinding); return( null == val || "" == val);
